title: SMP Utils
description: A Texture Pack That Adds Tons Of Quality Of Life Features For SMP's And PvP
body:
# SMP Utils
 **A Texture Pack That Adds Many Quality Of Life Features For SMP's And PvP While Being Vanilla**  

![SMPUtils Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b4e7d1d64f9ecc677212b0021c6480f03d99cc3.png)

# Features
- Low fire and low shield
- Smaller totem pop animation
- Quieter explosion, rain and fire hurt sounds
- Ore borders
- Brighter nether
- Blue powdered snow indicator
- Smaller grass
- Indicated tripwire and trapped chests
- Brewing stand guide
- Visible withered hearts
- Minimal rain and snow
- No fishing rod bobber on screen
- No pumpkin overlay & clear spyglass overlay
- No explosion particles
- And much more!

# Extra Info
I recently released a new pack called [SMPUtils Xtra](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/smputils-xtra) and in this pack i added all the features that dont belong in smputils so if you want stuff like small utils and clear water then check out it out! 

DM me on discord if there are any issues with the pack, my username is hunterleviathan

THANK YOU FOR 40K DOWNLOADS BLESS YALL FR!! ❤


<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>

**Stilt34**: helped to make the ground fire look like the vanilla texture but keep the screen fire low in the process
couldnt have done it without him! check out his [Plugins](https://modrinth.com/user/Stilt34) he got some good stuff too.

**VanillaTweaks:** SMP Utils Uses Some Assets From [VanillaTweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)

All Tweaks Used From Them Are Listed Below  
- Oreborders
- Visible Withered Hearts  
- Brewing Stand Guide

Vanilla Tweaks Allows Usage Of Their Packs If:  
- A `Credits.txt` File Is Included In The Download  
- A Clear Mention And Link To Their Website In The Description

All Of These Permissions Are Fulfilled In This Project

You Can Read Their Terms And Conditions [Here](https://vanillatweaks.net/terms/)


</details>
